top_signals.title: US launches strikes on Iran after Tehran attacks container ship
top_signals.summary: Washington says ‘unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping’ violated ceasefire between adversaries
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: $500K bourbon shipment stolen in alleged carrier impersonation scheme
top_signals.summary:
A shipment of approximately 10,800 bottles of Noble Oak Bourbon valued at $500,000 was allegedly stolen after suspects posed as authorized representatives to pick up the freight. The incident highlights a growing cargo theft tactic in which criminals use legitimate shipment information and impersonation to obtain freight without using force.

The post $500K bourbon shipment stolen in alleged carrier impersonation scheme appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Fortune Minerals gets $35M for Nico road
top_signals.summary: Natural Resources Canada’s First and Last Mile Fund will reimburse three-quarters of eligible costs.
